page: Amazon Web Services i8ge.3xlarge is an ARM64 storage-optimized server powered by the AWS Graviton ARMv9 Neoverse-V2 processor. Operating on the Nitro hypervisor, this instance features 12 dedicated physical cores and 12 vCPUs running at 2.8 GHz, supported by a 36 MB L3 cache. The architecture lacks hyper-threading and x86-specific vector extensions, but includes hardware-accelerated AES cryptography.

The server is configured with 96.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Local storage is a key feature of this instance, which includes a bundled 7500 GB NVMe SSD. Network connectivity is rated at a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps, providing reliable throughput for data transfer operations.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates top-tier memory performance, highlighted by a Passmark memory score in the top 10% and strong large-block memory bandwidth exceeding 210 GB/sec for reads and 109 GB/sec for writes. Single-threaded compression and decompression benchmarks are also strong. However, multi-core CPU performance and LLM inference speeds are average, while CPU encryption performance falls into the bottom 25%.

Given its high local storage capacity and strong memory subsystem, the i8ge.3xlarge offers excellent qualitative cost efficiency for data-dense environments. It is highly suited for database hosting, caching systems like Redis, large-scale file serving, and general-purpose workloads requiring high-speed local storage and substantial memory capacity.
description: Amazon Web Services i8ge.3xlarge is an ARM64 storage-optimized server featuring 12 dedicated AWS Graviton ARMv9 Neoverse-V2 cores at 2.8 GHz, 96 GB of RAM, and a bundled 7500 GB local NVMe SSD. Built on the Nitro hypervisor, it delivers a baseline network speed of 12 Gbps. Benchmarks show top-tier memory performance and strong large-block memory bandwidth, though CPU encryption performance is relatively weak. This hardware profile is highly optimized for databases, caching layers, and storage-intensive workloads.
og_description: Amazon Web Services i8ge.3xlarge is an ARM64 storage-optimized server featuring 12 Graviton vCPUs, 96 GB RAM, and 7500 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, designed for high-throughput database workloads.

tagline: An ARM64 storage-optimized instance combining high-capacity local NVMe SSD storage with top-tier memory bandwidth for data-intensive workloads.

Equipped with 96 GB of RAM and a massive 7500 GB local NVMe SSD
